item.title: 全球风险重燃美元需求，外汇掉期市场见升温
item.description: 在日均交易额达9.5万亿美元的外汇市场中，一项需求指标显示，随着中东地区战事升级重创全球风险偏好，美元融资需求正重燃热潮。【原文：A measure of demand in the $9.5-trillion-a-day foreign-exchange market is signaling renewed appetite for US dollar funding as a spiraling war in the Middle East slams global risk appetite.】

item.title: 桑坦德银行博廷称美西两国将很快恢复"非凡"关系
item.description: 桑坦德银行执行主席安娜·博廷试图淡化美国与西班牙之间出现的裂痕，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普威胁要削减与该国的贸易往来。【原文：Banco Santander SA Executive Chair Ana Botin sought to play down the rift that has opened between the US and Spain, following US President Donald Trump’s threats to cut trade with the country.】

item.title: 亮眼财报预示澳大利亚股市将迎来强劲提振
item.description: 澳大利亚二月份的强劲财报正吸引投资者重返这个资源丰富的市场，交易员们正为需求新一轮回升做准备。【原文：Australia’s blockbuster February earnings results are helping lure investors back to the commodity-rich market, as traders position themselves for a renewed upswing in demand.】

item.title: 派拉蒙收购华纳后将跻身最大垃圾债借款人行列
item.description: 惠誉评级将派拉蒙天空舞公司信用评级下调至垃圾级，此举使这家媒体公司有望成为美国高收益债券市场最大借款方之一。此前该公司已同意以1100亿美元收购竞争对手华纳兄弟探索公司。【原文：Fitch Ratings’ decision to cut Paramount Skydance Corp.’s credit ratings to junk put the media company on track to be one of the biggest borrowers in the US high-yield bond market, after it agreed to take over rival Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. in a $110 billion buyout.】

item.title: 纽约证交所马丁称地缘政治因素不太可能阻碍IPO进程
item.description: 纽约证券交易所集团总裁林恩·马丁表示，包括上周对伊朗的空袭在内的全球冲突，不太可能完全阻止企业进入美国公开市场。【原文：Global conflicts, including the strikes on Iran over the past week, are unlikely to put a complete stop to companies tapping the US public markets, according to NYSE Group Inc. President Lynn Martin said.】

item.title: 美国原油库存增长令油价涨势受阻，此轮涨势被视为短期现象
item.description: 周二原油价格飙升之际，美国石油股却陷入停滞。投资者开始抛售股票，并预期伊朗战争可能迅速解决——这场战争曾导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断，供应链受阻。【原文：US oil equities flatlined even as crude prices surged on Tuesday as investors began selling off and pricing in a possible quick resolution to the Iran war, which halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and disrupted supplies.】

item.title: 市政债券因通胀担忧创七月来最大跌幅
item.description: 周二市政债券抛售加剧，基准收益率一度攀升八个基点。中东地缘政治动荡与油价飙升连续第二日冲击美国国债市场。【原文：Municipal bonds deepened their selloff on Tuesday, with benchmark yields rising as much as eight basis points, as geopolitical unrest in the Middle East and surging oil prices roil US Treasuries for a second day.】

item.title: 美国商品期货交易委员会主席称加密货币相关永续合约即将推出
item.description: 美国顶级衍生品监管机构计划在数周内允许加密货币永续期货合约交易，将这种此前几乎完全存在于离岸交易所的交易工具引入境内市场。【原文：The US’s top derivatives regulator plans to allow perpetual futures contracts for cryptocurrencies within weeks, bringing onshore a trading instrument that has until now existed almost entirely on offshore exchanges.】

item.title: 中东航班停飞阻断迪拜黄金流动
item.description: 大量往返黄金交易中心迪拜的航班被取消，导致交易商无法调动黄金，凸显出中东战争可能引发实物黄金流动的潜在瓶颈。【原文：The mass cancellation of flights to and from bullion hub Dubai has left traders unable to move their metal, highlighting the potential bottlenecks to physical gold flows that could emerge from war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 谷歌为安卓系统新增类似苹果的来电筛选功能及行李追踪服务
item.description: 谷歌将允许其安卓移动操作系统的用户设置自定义来电显示信息，并在消息中分享实时位置，从而追赶上苹果公司已为iPhone用户提供的功能。【原文：Google will let users of its Android mobile operating system set up custom calling cards and share their live location in messages, catching up with features that Apple Inc. already offers to iPhone owners.】

item.title: 巴基斯坦誓言在阿富汗持续作战直至清除武装分子
item.description: 巴基斯坦高级安全官员表示，该国结束在阿富汗军事行动“不急于”推进，并誓言将继续作战，直至彻底摧毁那些从边境另一侧袭击巴基斯坦的武装组织。【原文：Pakistan is in “no hurry” to end its military operation in Afghanistan, a senior security official said, vowing to continue fighting until it’s certain its destroyed militant groups targeting the country from across the border.】

item.title: 摩根大通与富国银行为Select Medical提供10亿美元贷款
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通公司和富国银行公司正提供约10亿美元债务融资，以支持医院运营商Select Medical Holdings的管理层收购。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Wells Fargo & Co. are providing about $1 billion in debt to support the management buyout of hospital operator Select Medical Holdings, according to people with knowledge of the transaction.】

item.title: 美国证交会正抵制新一轮高杠杆ETF计划
item.description: 美国证券交易委员会周一罕见地召集杠杆ETF发行商召开电话会议，要求其暂停推进新一轮计划中的基金发行，以此重申其对日益激进的基金结构的反对立场。【原文：The US Securities and Exchange Commission asked leveraged-ETF issuers not to move forward with a new wave of planned funds, using a rare group call Monday to renew its push against increasingly aggressive fund structures.】

item.title: 刚果关键铜出口路线在暴雨损毁桥梁后重新开放
item.description: 刚果民主共和国是全球第二大铜生产国，该国通往海外的主要铜出口路线在经历周末暴雨冲毁部分路段后，现已重新开放通行。【原文：The main export route for copper out of the Democratic Republic of Congo, the world’s second-biggest producer of the metal, reopened to traffic after heavy rains had washed away a section of it at the weekend.】

item.title: Thrive Capital与Andreessen领投Anduril 40亿美元融资轮
item.description: 乔希·库什纳的Thrive Capital与风险投资公司安德森·霍洛维茨正联合领投安杜里尔工业公司的融资轮，此轮融资可能使这家国防科技初创企业的估值翻倍。【原文：Josh Kushner’s Thrive Capital and venture firm Andreessen Horowitz are co-leading a fundraising round for Anduril Industries Inc. that could nearly double the defense tech startup’s valuation.】

item.title: 伊朗战争扰乱石油供应，超级油轮日成本逼近50万美元
item.description: 由于霍尔木兹海峡的航运交通几乎完全停滞，全球最大型油轮在该行业基准航线上的租船成本再创新高。【原文：The cost of booking the world’s biggest oil tankers on the industry’s benchmark route hit a fresh record as shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains all-but halted.】

item.title: ASM营收展望因人工智能投资和中国市场表现优于预期
item.description: ASM国际公司第一季度营收预测超出分析师预期，得益于人工智能相关投资的推动以及对中国市场强劲需求的预期。【原文：ASM International NV forecast revenue for the first quarter that beat analysts’ estimates, boosted by artificial intelligence-linked investments and expectations of strong China demand.】

item.title: 市场中几乎无处可藏
item.description: 反风险平价交易。【原文：The anti-risk parity trade.】

item.title: 高通首席执行官预测2026年将成为人工智能代理之年
item.description: 高通公司首席执行官克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙本周在巴塞罗那世界移动通信大会上表示，人工智能代理的浪潮将彻底改变更广泛的数字生态系统。【原文：Qualcomm Inc. Chief Executive Officer Cristiano Amon, speaking this week at the MWC Barcelona conference, said the incoming tide of artificial intelligence agents will transform the wider digital ecosystem.】

item.title: 加拿大股市创关税风波以来最大跌幅，矿业股遭抛售
item.description: 加拿大股市周二遭遇重挫，跌幅创下自四月关税引发市场暴跌以来的最大纪录。中东地区不断升级的冲突令投资者心惊胆战，连黄金和能源股这类传统避险资产也遭到抛售。【原文：Canadian equities stumbled on Tuesday, by the most since April’s tariff-fueled market rout, as an escalating war in the Middle East unnerved investors who exited even traditional safe havens like gold and energy stocks.】

item.title: 美联储卡什卡里称伊朗战争给利率路径带来不确定性
item.description: 明尼阿波利斯联邦储备银行行长尼尔·卡什卡利此前曾预计今年将降息一次，但他表示，伊朗遭受袭击后，他对这一预期不再那么确定。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis President Neel Kashkari, who had penciled in one interest-rate cut this year, said the attacks on Iran make him less certain about that.】

item.title: 芝加哥商品交易所拒绝交易员要求赔偿停机损失的诉求
item.description: 芝加哥商业交易所已驳回至少两名天然气投资者的赔偿要求。此前因技术故障导致交易中断，在结算价格计算的关键时期造成投资者蒙受损失。【原文：The Chicago Mercantile Exchange has rejected demands for compensation from at least two natural gas investors who lost money when a technical glitch disrupted trading during the key period when settlement prices are calculated.】

item.title: “好了，该走了”：出租车、现金与迂回路线——逃离迪拜的种种方式
item.description: 在中东各地，随着商业航空公司暂停大部分区域航班，滞留旅客被迫另辟蹊径，在不断扩大的战区外寻找复杂曲折的逃生路线。【原文：Across the Middle East, stranded travelers are being forced to improvise byzantine routes out of the widening war zone as commercial airlines put most of their regional services on hold.】

item.title: Ares首席执行官称瑞银关于15%私募债务违约率的预测"绝对错误"
item.description: 瑞银集团分析师上周预测私人信贷违约率可能达到15%，对此，Ares Management公司首席执行官迈克·阿鲁盖蒂表示该预测"完全错误"。【原文：A forecast last week from UBS Group AG analysts that private credit default rates could reach 15% was “absolutely wrong,” Ares Management Corp.’s Chief Executive Officer Mike Arougheti said.】

item.title: 德意志银行称，私募信贷领域1430亿美元杠杆贷款存量构成市场风险
item.description: 德意志银行分析师指出，商业发展公司正坐拥大量杠杆贷款，这些贷款可能被出售以满足赎回请求，从而推高利差。【原文：Business development companies are sitting on a massive pile of leveraged loans, which could be sold to meet redemption requests and push spreads wider, according to Deutsche Bank AG analysts.】

item.title: 索罗斯首席投资官称市场将持续痛苦逾一年
item.description: 索罗斯基金管理公司首席投资官道恩·菲茨帕特里克表示，随着市场应对地缘政治风险和人工智能颠覆性威胁，投资者将面临18至24个月的"痛苦"时期。【原文：Soros Fund Management Chief Investment Officer Dawn Fitzpatrick said investors are in for a “painful” 18 to 24 months as markets grapple with geopolitical risks and the threat of AI disruption.】

item.title: 黑石集团格雷为信贷投资组合估值辩护，股价持续下跌
item.description: 黑石集团总裁乔恩·格雷——其公司旗舰私募信贷基金遭遇创纪录赎回——将市场担忧称为"大量噪音"，而黑石股价已跌至2023年11月以来的最低点。【原文：Blackstone Inc. President Jon Gray — whose company’s flagship private credit fund was hit by record redemptions — called the concerns in the market a “ton of noise” as Blackstone shares fell to the lowest level since November 2023.】

item.title: 卢拉政府不愿在巴西银行巨额亏损后援助巴西复兴银行
item.description: 卢拉政府正抵制向巴西银行（BRB）提供金融救助的提议。这家国有银行由政治对手掌控，因涉及Banco Master SA的亏损而面临增资压力。【原文：President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s government is resisting the idea of extending a financial lifeline to BRB, a state-owned bank controlled by a political adversary and under pressure to bolster capital after losses tied to Banco Master SA.】

item.title: 战争扰乱霍尔木兹海峡，俄罗斯获得提升石油收入的机会
item.description:
飙升的油价和印度可能重启采购的潜力，或将为克里姆林宫的战争资金注入新的活力

【原文：

Soaring prices and potential for renewed Indian buying could boost Kremlin’s war chest

】

item.title: 高盛私人信贷主管称门槛是功能而非缺陷
item.description: 高盛集团一位私募信贷主管表示，对资金赎回的限制是"设计功能而非缺陷"，因为这个规模达1.8万亿美元的市场正面临投资者争相撤资的日益增大压力。【原文：One of Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s private credit chiefs said limits on fund withdrawals are “features and not bugs,” as the $1.8 trillion market comes under increasing pressure from investors looking to exit.】
